description: After selling a customer a new high-end smartphone, the agent should attempt to sell them device insurance.

nodes.task_description: Following a new phone order, present the device insurance options.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent pivots to an insurance offer.

nodes.task_description: Explain the coverage details (e.g., theft, accidental damage) and the monthly cost.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly explains what the insurance covers.

nodes.task_description: Add the selected insurance plan to the customer's account.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully adds the insurance feature.
